children.heading: Examination of books and records
children.label: b Examination of books and records

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Any record relating to the importer declaration program required under shall be treated as a record required to be maintained and produced under title V of this Act.section 1683a of this title1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Examination of records
children.label: 2 Examination of records
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury is authorized to take such action, and examine such records, under , as the Secretary determines necessary to verify the declarations made pursuant to are true and accurate.section 1509 of this titlesection 1683a(c) of this title
